feedback.text: I am 42 years old and I have been playing games since I was 6 years old. Since the nintendo 8 bits days. I have luckly growing up with games. I have been playing games a couple hours each day and I have been doing it for decades now. That is my hobby and I am proud of it. If game companies wanna remove games I have brought with my own money we should at least get a refound from them for every cent I spend on it or in mine case øre.
